mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO market_sector_ranking_item (batch_id, rank_no, provider_sector_id, sector_name, change_rate, leading_name, leading_symbol, leading_change_rate, indicator_name, indicator_value) VALUES
(#{item.batchId}, #{item.rankNo}, #{item.providerSectorId}, #{item.sectorName}, #{item.changeRate}, #{item.leadingName}, #{item.leadingSymbol}, #{item.leadingChangeRate}, #{item.indicatorName}, #{item.indicatorValue})
mapper.select: SELECT id, batch_id, rank_no, provider_sector_id, sector_name, change_rate, leading_name, leading_symbol, leading_change_rate, indicator_name, indicator_value, created_at FROM market_sector_ranking_item WHERE batch_id = #{batchId} ORDER BY rank_no ASC
